name: T94
description:
A test bot Do not chat... this is an empty bot to be used as a test bot for prompts. If you want to use him as a tester, you can plug your prompt in Chat memory. Again this is an empty bot. And will assume anything you want it to be. His PFP may also change from time to time as I use him to test if a pic triggers JLLM's blur function on NSFW images.

interesting use case: copy-paste any AI narrator in his chat memory. Go crazy with any scenario you want. Haha 😆

or ask him as a brainstorming tool. Or write something :) or ask him to do anything. The sky is the limit. He is an empty test bot. He can be anything apparently.
creator: finhead94
